itemListElement.reviewBody: I am a 2019 PCM passed out and this school teachers were very bad and discourages ever student. We lost a talented gem of our school because of the bad principal Mrs Lalita and the faculties. The talented gem was my senior Anurag Simha from commerce batch, he use to win lots of interschool robotics competition and this school never acknowledged him at all. I was always fascinated by his talent and he is my guru too. He taught me robotics from scratch. Today he has mutilple patents and awards. I never metsuch a passionate guy like him ever. He was the best example I could provide. I request dav to please acknowledge him

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V. Boys Senior Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody: The best place for tummy tuck liposuction. I am having fantastic results. Its been 30 days since the surgery and yet I see very good results. The one thing am more impressed is with Dr. Sreelatha"s genuine guidance and care. No over promises. Her instructions are very clear and easy to practice. Ofcourse their nurses are very kind, caring and supportive. I would strongly recommend Silky to the ones looking for tummy tuck process.

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V. Boys Senior Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Respected Principal, please teach your kids and inform their parents to obey the traffic rules properly.  In the morning hours, most of they are coming in the opposite direction, causing public nuisance and lot of disturbance to office goers.  I agree, school management is not responsible for the mistake parents are doing but you can take some action by deploying few ppl and strictly ask them to revert/go back.  If school is not teaching this discipline to kids, who can do? School's responsibility is not only to teach/provide good education but also to teach good DISCIPLINE!

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V. Boys Senior Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Did my entire schooling in this school(kgs till my 12th grade). I can say that this is one of the best schools out there. What makes it stand out is the way the students are taught;they focus on making the students understand the subject rather than piling up assignments on top of assignments on the their head. A fair amount of freedom and support is given for students who are in sports. It's a great school all around. But there is one major drawback. Most of the faculties are great,be it in teaching or just being there for the student but umm,a handful of faculties are extremely casteist and if there are students from the lower caste,who are a tad slow, they become minced meat for those faculties.I experienced this first hand. Now i wasn't bad at studies until my 10th,i scored 9 points in all the core subjects. There were a few faculties who did try to humiliate me,kept repeating i was just gonna end up on the roads as a nobody etc etc, whenever i committed an small err or ths. I honestly never saw it being done this extensively,to anyone else. I was a pretty weak minded lad back then and i didn't understand where all that came from. But there was this one faculty who stood out(I hope they have stopped teaching altogether now bcz no matter how good they are,if they cannot keep the caste aspect out of teaching,they are not to fit to teach- bcz like the saying goes mata,pita,guru,deivam,you expect your guru,no;it is a pre requisite for ur guru to be a model human being since they play a major role in how ur life turns out). And yes, they not only made me fall on their feet,but they called my parent to school,and the interaction was extremely unsavoury{the meeting was called to address my mistakes(my class notes were incomplete.. YES,THATS IT!!!) but the way in which it was addressed spoke a lot more}. Now mind u,my parent was a well distinguished gazetted officer of the government and understood what had happened and was fuming because of the behaviour of that particular faculty,but didn't press on the matter further bcz they didn't want to sabotage my time there. It left a bad taste when my parent had explained what really had  happened there and i was mortified. Now i would still recommend this school bcz i don't believe a few bad apples ought to make the whole barrel rotten. Just teach your kids what to watch out for and how to deal with such people and incidents prior to getting admission, especially if u belong to the lower castes.

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V. Boys Senior Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody:
A very good school in terms of academics and especially for class 11&12... One of the top schools in Chennai constantly producing high results!
Teachers are highly dedicated, professional and well educated!!!

But has few disadvantages for other classes where children need overall development:
It's a boys only school.... They somehow don't believe in Coed culture!
Doesn't host cultural activities as other schools do!
